entry.title: OData and MDK: I can't access the value of a property of an entity related to $expand
entry.content:
Hello community, thank you very much for the help. I have an exposed odata v4 service which gives me two entities that are related. If I build the query correctly using expand I can get results like this:

The problem is that in my mobile application it is showing me the description of the "Audit" entity and not the description of the "TipoAuditoria" entity.

I set up the relationship like this. My detail view "Auditoria_Detail.page" is like this:

And in my edit view, we can see that the values ​​are taken as follows:

{Auditoria/DESCRIPCION}

{TipoAuditoria/DESCRIPCION}

At first glance everything seems to be fine, but when I enter my application I find the following:

It gives me the description for Audit. What am I doing wrong? In "Tipo de auditoría" it should say: "Auditoría Operativa"

entry.title: Can we filter for null values in Fiori elements?
entry.content:
I have a Fiori elements app, using a CDS based v2 OData service. One of the filters is a date field, and I would like to apply a filter where Date is null (empty, no value present). Setting the filters as <empty> using the default value help generates an OData request with the right format.

$filter=SalesOrganization eq '1000' and BookingInDate eq null

The result is no rows.

When I look for a particular document, which I know has an empty date, this is what I see in the console.

 

{
...
"BookingInDate":null
...
}

 

 The table has null, the OData service returns null, the filter applies null, but for some reason these nulls are not treated as equal when filtering.

Does anyone have any suggestions on how to filter for null dates?

We are casting null as a default date value (01-01-1900), and then filtering for this value to see rows that match. Surely there has to be a better way, right?

entry.title: SAPUI5 ODataListBinding.create duplicates entries
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I am building an SAPUI5 application based on OData V2 build with SEGW.

I am facing a weird behavior: In a sap.m.Table my created entries are duplicated after submitting and refreshing.

The table is defined like this:

<Table
    id="KeyfToSourceTable"
    mode="{= ${keyfEdit>/editing} ? 'MultiSelect' : 'None' }"
    items="{
        path: '/MapKeyfSourceSet'
    }" >
    <headerToolbar>
        <OverflowToolbar>
        <Title text="Table" level="H3" />
        <ToolbarSpacer />
            <Button
                icon="sap-icon://add"
                press=".onDatasourceHelpRequested"
                visible="{keyfEdit>/editing}" />
            <Button
                icon="sap-icon://delete"
                press=".onDatasourceDeletePressed"
                visible="{keyfEdit>/editing}" />
        
        </OverflowToolbar>
    </headerToolbar>
    <columns>
        <Column>
            <Text text="Sourcestxt" />
        </Column>
        <Column>
            <Text text="Employeetext" />
        </Column>
        <Column>
            <Text text="SbTxtlg" />
        </Column>
    </columns>
    <items>
        <ColumnListItem vAlign="Middle">
            <cells>
                <ObjectIdentifier
                    title="{Sourcestxt}"/>
                <Text
                    text="{Employeetext}" />
                <Text
                    text="{SbTxtlg}" />
            </cells>
        </ColumnListItem>
    </items>
</Table>

It displays entities mapped to my main object. So I filter these at runtime (and sometimes I have to rebind the table):

var sourceSystemTable = this.byId("KeyfToSourceTable");
var keyfId = this.getView().getBindingContext().getProperty("Keyfid");
var filterArray = [new Filter("Keyfid", FilterOperator.EQ, keyfId)];
sourceSystemTable.bindItems({path:"/MapKeyfSourceSet", template: oldTemplate, filters: new Filter(filterArray, true)})

The User should be able to edit the main object and the mapping table and just save at the end. But the table should display the new entries, which are not persisted yet. Therefore I use the ODataListBinding.create function like it is discribed in the documentation:

this.byId("KeyfToSourceTable").getBinding("items").create(oEntry, {
    inactive : false,
    success: function(data) {
        alert("success createdMapping");
    },
    error: function(data) {
        alert("error createdMapping");
    }
});

It works as designed, new Entries are shown and not persisted until the user clicks "save" and submitChanges() is called.

But after a refresh() is called or the Binding of the table is changed, the new entries are duplicated. They are added at the top of the table again. I already looked at the BindingContexts of the items and the binding of the table, the bindings seem absolutly the same.

Even when I look at a differend main object and the filter doesn't seem to work for these duplicates. They also appear at the top of the table. But looking at the binding and also getting the filterted property, they shouldn't be there. These duplicates don't exists in the backend/data base tables. They also all are not transient, so I am not able to filter them by myself.

I assume these duplicates are just in the client model.

I appreciate any help,
Kind regards

Tobias

entry.title: Error : com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException:
entry.content:
Hi, I am facing this Error while trying to fetch data using Odata Adapter, I have used the address as the integration suite URL:
 
com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: An exception of type 'WstxUnexpectedCharException' occurred., cause: com.ctc.wstx.exc.WstxUnexpectedCharException: Unexpected character '=' (code 61); expected a semi-colon after the reference for entity 'client_id' at [row,col {unknown-source}]: [1,539]

entry.title: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities
entry.content:
Hi All, 

How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities?

API: Condition Record for Pricing in Sales
  • Sales: Pricing Communication Head (SD_PRICECOMHEAD)
  • Sales: Pricing Communication Item (SD_PRICECOMITEM)

    I use "Custom Fields"  to create and publish a new custom filed in SD_PRICECOMITEM, and use "Adapt UI" to add it in "Manage Price - Sales" .

    When I maintain this field and save this step in UI, I couldn't see any value in custom filed on  "API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV".

     

     What's the next step I should do?

    I don't know how to map this custom field to the correct target table if I need to add a bapi or other method.

     

     

     

     

    Thanks,

    Eric

entry.title: Standard API to fetch Shipping Point Address details of Outbound Delivery
entry.content:
Is there a standard API which can be used to fetch Shipping Point Address details of an Outbound Delivery?
Can only get the shipping point ID from the below API
Overview | Outbound Delivery (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: In RAP API unmanaged scenario with draft, Finalized method getting called during patch call
entry.content: Hello all, I am working on RAP API ( OData V4 UI ) unmanaged scenario with draft, so while every patch call ( entering field value ) save sequence methods ( finalize, save..etc ) is getting called. What can be wrong, Is it possible to avoid save sequence methods during patch call?. Thank You

entry.title: RAP - Create POST Service with standard BO call
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I have a requirement I have been working with for the last couple of weeks but I'm stuck and don't know how to achieve what I need.

I need to be able to expose a service to call as POST with a deep body (header, items, partners, etc) and in the service I need to call I_SalesOrderTP using MODIFY ENTITIES to create a sales order with the payload recieved.

Can't use I_SalesOrderTP API directly since I need the option to do some pre and post processing with a lot of custom code related to the business.

I've tried creating behavior implementations from CDS and custom entities, tried unamanged and managed with unmanaged save, tried using static actions with deep parameters and deep result but was not able to make it work.

Is there a way I can create a service NOT from a CDS/BEHAVIOR? Do I need to go with HTTP service?

Any help will be highly appreciated!

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Unable to convert an SAP Script as a PDF and send it via OData (for PDF Viewer Functionality)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Apologies if the question is a bit vague; but I am struggling to achieve; is to convert an existing SAP Script Output to a PDF and then send that PDF via ODATA ( using Media handling ) .

The Output is a PO output designed on SAP Script. So the way I am converting it to a PDF is as follows:

1. Find out the NAST Record for a given Output
2. Using the NAST Record; get the Spool ID.
3. Using FM - RSPO_RETURN_SPOOLJOB get the OTF Data
4. Using FM - CONVERT_OTF_2_PDF converting the ODT to PDF data
5. Then converting the PDF data to XSTRING and then passing that to my get_stream method as below:

Logic for converting SAP Script to PDF:

However when I test the Get_Stream method using /iwfnd/gw_client ; I get the following error:

Please advise where could I be going wrong?

Regards,

Pablo Ghosh Roy

entry.title: I’m facing an issue with mass updating a date field in a Fiori List Report using OData V4 batch call
entry.content:
Problem:

Single batch updates work fine.

Mass updates fail entirely if there’s any error, even for valid entries.

What We’ve Tried:

Implemented two-way data binding.

Attempted to continue processing after an error in batch processing, but it didn’t work.

 

Questions:

How can we ensure valid entries are updated even if some entries have errors?

Is there a way to handle errors at the entry level rather than the batch level?

What are the best practices for mass updates with error handling using OData V4 in a Fiori List Report?

Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!
#odatav4, SAP Fiori Elements , SAP Fiori Makers SAPUI5

entry.title: How to parse an Employee Central ODATA into ABAP table
entry.content:
I can retrieve a SuccessFactors Employee Central ODATA file, for example ODATA BenefitEnrollment, using an ABAP program.  But I'm unsure about how to parse the data into an internal table with the retrieved data columns and values.  Does someone have an example ABAP program on how to achieve this?

Thanks,

Kenneth

entry.title: Odata Service $skip vs. $skiptoken
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have checked this blog (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/difference-between-skip-and-skiptoken-in-odata/ba-p/13560047), and understood that the difference between $skip and $skiptoken is as follow.

$skip ->client-controlled paging

$skiptoken -> server-side paging

However, is there any difference when it comes to use-case in the reality?

For example, what I assume now is that maybe one of them would consume more data than the other. (I do not know if this is true.)

 

Could someone kindly advise on this?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: The order of payload when using Odata adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm encountering an unusual issue with OData queries in SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI), and I'm hoping someone can shed some light on this problem.

The Issue

When I perform an OData GET query, the order of the data fields in the result is reversed when using SAP CPI compared to when I use Postman.

Postman Result (Correct Order):

Product, ProductType, LastChangeDate

SAP CPI Result (Reversed Order):

LastChangeDate, ProductType, Product

I've attempted to resolve this by adding the $orderby parameter to my query, but unfortunately, this did not solve the issue. ($orderby=Product,ProductType,LastChangeDate)

 

My Questions are

1. Why might this reversal of field order occur when using SAP CPI?
2. How can I ensure that the field order in SAP CPI matches what I see in Postman?

As your reference, the attached screenshots show the Integration flow as well as the connection configuration for Odata Adapter, as well as the payload with reversed order.

 

It would be a huge help if you could please kindly advise on this one!

Thank you.

entry.title: Enable to enable OAuth for Odata service created in SAP system
entry.content:
Hello SAP Folks,

I have exposed an S4HANA table as Odata service in SAP system. The Odata service works perfectly fine when tested with CRUD operations in SAP gateway client as  well as Browser. Also tested the same in Postman it works fine.

screenshot for reference

@

My question is : now I want to consume this into an Non SAP Application using oAuth client where i need  to pass below details  how can i enable / generate this details  for the Odata service that i have  created.

Can someone pls help here.

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Mellinda

@BobShen 

@SAPCommunity 

@odata 

 

OData

entry.title: Custom Date Input Field in Manage Customer Line Items App
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

 

As I added the date custom field in Manage Customer Line Items App and it added to the filterbar properly by extending the standard OData service FAR_CUSTOMER_LINE_ITEMS.

 

But I want to achieve this date custom field UI behavior like other existing date field UI behavior. 

For example, when we select the date in the standard field "Open on Key Date", we can select Date, Today, Yesterday, Tomorrow etc. 

 

 How can we achieve the same in the custom date field?

 

Regards,

Tamilselvan

entry.title: How to Integrate two different Custom Api in eclipse?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to use Custom API : I_BusinessPartnerTP_3 / I_CRDTMBUSINESSPARTNERTP to create Business Partner and Credit Data.

How to build classes to integrate them in eclipse? 

When I update CreditLimitAmount Field, I want to get the information that CreditSegment was created.

If it wasn't created, I should use Create CreditSegment Field first.

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: Import ABAP Dictionary Structure doesn't Create CRUD-Methods in SEGW
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I got a problem that if I import a new structure into my data model and generate the runtime object, it doesn't create methods like CREATE, UPDATE, GET_ENTITY, GET_ENTITYSET etc. in the DPC_EXT. Does anyone know, why that is?

I'm in the transaction SEGW and created a new project for an App Extension. Thanks for the communities help in advance!

Cheers

entry.title: Failed to generate the backend operation proxy for RFC
entry.content:
When I try to generate the odata of my project I am faced with this error and no matter what I did it won't generate, I don't have any open requests that includes another entity of the odata
I have tried to remap the entity that uses that function module and removed all the variables that uses the data type P and still no luck any help

entry.title: Configure the SWFVISU for Parked document
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently trying to create the visualization parameters on SWFVISU for displaying header and item information of 'Parked Document' (Business Object: FIPP) I was looking for the corresponding My Inbox FIORI Service, and i came up with one service 'Verify Journal Entries in General Ledger - For Processor (Inbox)',

I tried to fill all the parameters in my custom task (TS90000084) based on standard task,

 

however, it didnt work and it showed error 

Can anyone share the correct visualization parameter for custom decision task of Parked Document (FIPP)?

 

Regards,

Muhammad Febrian Rizky

entry.title: Usage of filter on multilevel expand
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have multiple level entities Order header/Item/Schedule.

I am trying to filter based on Material which is at item level. But, I am getting orders headers for which there are no items at all. My requirement is that if there are no items with the given material, the order header should also be not displayed.

Tried below two options

1) This is giving all the header records, even those which do not have any item with material '123'. Item entities are blank in such cases

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zsales_order_srv/srvd_a2x/sap/zsales_order/0001/SalesOrderHeader?$expand=_Item($expand=_Schedule)&$filter=(_Item/all(s: s/Material eq '123')

2) This is giving only the headers which has at least one item with material  '123'. However it is getting all the other items in the orders whose item is something else.

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zsales_order_srv/srvd_a2x/sap/zsales_order/0001/SalesOrderHeader?$expand=_Item($expand=_Schedule)&$filter=(_Item/any(s: s/Material eq '123')

Request you to help me with the right filter and expand options
